title: Molten Sour Dutch Soy Sauce Lardons Stamppot
description: A festive Dutch dish featuring soy sauce, lardons-render, and a twist of sourness. This low-calorie-friendly stamppot is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the lardons-render in a large skillet over medium heat until melted.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the chopped kale and cook until wilted.
Stir in 120g of shredded cabbage and cook for 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with a dollop of sour Dutch sauce.
To make the sour Dutch sauce, mix 100g of Greek yogurt with 10g of Dijon mustard and 5g of chopped fresh chives.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chives if desired
